title: Climatic
body:
A simple mod that rewrites the world generation to favor cold biomes in the north, and hot biomes in the south.

Want to find some snow, but have no idea where a cold biome is? Just head north!

Need a place to dig mass amounts of sand for your new glass dome, but have no idea where a desert is? Just head south!

Wanna explore more, but not change the temperature of biome you're in? Just go east or west!

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Z8Z714G8U7)
